rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly analyzed the argument chain, identifying multiple inconsistencies and proposing specific repairs.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly disclosed uncertainties regarding training data and assumptions about target usage.
rationale.RX.3: The critique strictly adhered to the scope of the introduction without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; instead, the critique aimed to improve the paper's quality.
rationale.RX.5: While major points were clear, minor edits lacked traceability.
